values.description: Base URL for all versioned API endpoints.
CSRF token extracted from the csrf_token cookie. Auto-populated by '⚙ Init — Get CSRF Token'. Injected as X-CSRF-Token on POST/PATCH/DELETE by the collection pre-request script. Valid for 24 h.
RS256 JWT access token. Auto-populated by Login / Register / Refresh Token requests.
Opaque refresh token. The server sends this as an HttpOnly cookie — this variable is for documentation only.
UUID of the authenticated user. Auto-populated by Login / Register.
UUID of the last created reminder. Auto-populated by Create Reminder.
UUID of the last created document. Auto-populated by Create Document.
UUID of the last created subscription. Auto-populated by Create Subscription.
UUID of the last created goal. Auto-populated by Create Goal.
UUID of the last created family member. Auto-populated by Add Family Member.
UUID of a specific notification (manual — list /notifications to find one).
UUID of a user session for revocation. Use Get Sessions to find IDs.
